title: FAKIR: Foundational Architecture for Knowledge, Intelligence & Reasoning (UKOP kernel)
description: Kernel of the Universal Knowledge Operating Platform (UKOP). v0.2: reuses the Zistgah DOME7 diagrid dome implementation verbatim and places the exhaustive knowledge lattice inside it - every UN ISIC Rev.4 section/division/group/class (21/88/238/419), every ILO ISCO-08 major/sub-major/minor/unit group (10/43/130/436) and every UNESCO ISCED-F 2013 broad/narrow/detailed field (11/29/80): 1,505 nodes, 935 leaves x AGI stack L0-L9 (Project ILM) = 9,350 seed points. Every node at every level seeds an AAB-methodology, oracle-gated task (VGC doi:10.5281/zenodo.21264248). Includes the 11-poster UKOP/FAKIR/Kaivalyik corpus with trademark disclaimer.
notes: (c) 1993-2026 Abhishek Choudhary. All rights reserved. AI model: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic). DOI injected post-mint; no fabrication.
